data.title: IAG Launches €500 Million Share Buyback Program
data.description:
International Consolidated Airlines ( (GB:IAG) ) has provided an update.

International Consolidated Airlines Group (IAG) has initiated the first tranche of a €1,000 million share buyback program, starting with €500 million. The program aims to reduce IAG’s share capital and involves strategic participation from Qatar Airways to maintain its stake. The buyback will be conducted on the London and Spanish Stock Exchanges and is expected to impact the company’s capital structure positively.

More about International Consolidated Airlines

International Consolidated Airlines Group (IAG) operates in the aviation industry, providing air transportation services. The company is a major player in the airline sector with a focus on international travel and operates several well-known airline brands.

YTD Price Performance: 12.19%

Average Trading Volume: 23,534,836

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £16.28B

data.title: City of London Investment Management Increases Stake in Pacific Horizon Investment Trust
data.description:
The latest update is out from Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:PHI) ).

The notification from Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC reveals that City of London Investment Management Company Limited has increased its voting rights in the company to 15.14%, up from a previous 14.75%. This change in holdings signifies a strengthened position for City of London Investment Management within Pacific Horizon, potentially influencing future decisions and strategies of the investment trust.

More about Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC

Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC is a UK-based investment company that primarily focuses on investing in the Asia-Pacific region, excluding Japan. The company aims to deliver long-term capital growth by investing in a diversified portfolio of companies across various sectors within this geographic market.

YTD Price Performance: 1.92%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Arbe Robotics to Announce Q4 & FY 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Arbe Robotics ( (ARBE) ) has issued an announcement.

Arbe Robotics Ltd. announced that it will host a live conference call on March 5, 2025, to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The announcement, made on February 12, 2025, highlights the company’s commitment to transparency and engagement with stakeholders. The call will feature key executives and provide insights into the company’s financial performance and strategic direction. This event is significant for stakeholders as it offers a detailed look at Arbe’s operations and market positioning amid ongoing geopolitical challenges in Israel.

More about Arbe Robotics

Arbe Robotics Ltd. is a global leader in perception radar solutions, focusing on enabling safe driver-assist systems and paving the way for full autonomous driving. The company’s radar technology is significantly more detailed than others on the market, serving as a critical sensor for advanced autonomy levels. Arbe’s technology empowers automakers, Tier 1 suppliers, and various vehicle applications with advanced sensing capabilities. The company is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel, with offices in China, Germany, and the United States.

YTD Price Performance: -6.86%

Average Trading Volume: 9,586,671

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $181.3M

data.title: Paragon REIT Updates Trust Deed for Electronic Communication
data.description:
Paragon REIT ( (SG:SK6U) ) has shared an update.

Paragon REIT Management Pte. Ltd. has announced amendments to the trust deed of Paragon REIT, allowing for electronic dissemination of notices or documents related to take-over offers or rights issues, in compliance with relevant laws and guidelines. These amendments, certified by the trustee as non-prejudicial to unitholders’ interests, do not require their approval and are intended to streamline communication processes for the trust.

More about Paragon REIT

Paragon REIT is a real estate investment trust based in Singapore, managed by Paragon REIT Management Pte. Ltd. The trust focuses on real estate investments and operates under the regulations of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.03B

data.title: Record plc Announces Share Acquisition by Senior Manager
data.description:
Record plc ( (GB:REC) ) has shared an announcement.

Record plc, a company listed on the London Stock Exchange, announced a transaction involving its Share Incentive Plan. On February 27, 2025, Thomas Arnold, the Head of the Client Team, acquired 429 ordinary shares at a price of 52.34 pence per share. This acquisition was conducted in accordance with the Market Abuse Regulation and highlights the ongoing engagement of senior management with the company’s share incentive schemes.

data.title: Dominion Lending Centres Completes $59.15 Million Share Offering
data.description:
Dominion Lending Centres, Inc. (Canada) Class A ( (TSE:DLCG) ) just unveiled an update.

Dominion Lending Centres Inc. announced the closing of a $59.15 million secondary private placement offering of Class A common shares. The sale was conducted by Mauris Family Investments Inc. and 603908 B.C. Ltd., reducing their ownership stakes in the company. The transaction did not provide proceeds to Dominion Lending Centres but was significant for the selling shareholders, who have agreed to a 180-day lock-up period, indicating stability in the company’s shareholder structure.

More about Dominion Lending Centres, Inc. (Canada) Class A

Dominion Lending Centres Inc. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on mortgage brokerage services. The company is based in Canada and is known for its extensive network of mortgage professionals, providing a wide range of lending solutions to consumers.

data.title: United States 12 Month Oil Fund Reports January 2025 Financials
data.description:
United States 12 Month Oil Fund LP ( (USL) ) has shared an update.

On February 28, 2025, United States 12 Month Oil Fund, LP released its monthly account statement for January 2025, showing a net income of $392,258. The statement revealed a decrease in net asset value from $49,416,184 at the beginning of the month to $47,830,383 by the end of January, following withdrawals of 50,000 shares.

More about United States 12 Month Oil Fund LP

United States 12 Month Oil Fund, LP operates within the commodity investment industry, focusing on the management and trading of oil futures. The company provides investors with exposure to oil prices through a portfolio that tracks the performance of oil futures contracts over a 12-month period.

data.title: Experian Announces Total Voting Rights Update
data.description:
Experian ( (GB:EXPN) ) has shared an announcement.

Experian plc has announced its total voting rights as of February 28, 2025, in compliance with the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rule. The company has a total of 919,329,151 voting rights, which shareholders can use as a denominator for calculating their interests in the company’s shares. This announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides clarity on shareholding structures and ensures transparency in accordance with regulatory requirements.

More about Experian

Experian plc is a global data and technology company that specializes in providing data analytics and consumer credit reporting services. The company operates in the financial services industry, focusing on delivering insights and solutions to help businesses manage credit risk, prevent fraud, and automate decision-making processes.

data.title: PetVivo Holdings Renames Subsidiary to Focus on Animal Health
data.description:
An update from PetVivo Holdings ( (PETV) ) is now available.

PetVivo Holdings, Inc. announced a name change for its subsidiary, PetVivo, Inc., to PetVivo Animal Health, Inc., effective March 1, 2025. This change, acknowledged by the Minnesota Secretary of State on February 11, 2025, reflects the company’s strategic focus on animal health and aims to strengthen its market positioning.

PetVivo Holdings, Inc. operates in the animal health industry, focusing on developing and commercializing innovative medical devices and therapeutics for pets.
